Restaurants Are Losing Revenue Every Day

Traditional dining experiences are bottlenecked by manual processes, costing you both money and customer satisfaction.

Waiters miss upselling opportunities
Long ordering times during rush hours
Order errors and kitchen miscommunication
Lack of actionable customer insights
No real-time analytics for owners
Manual kitchen coordination slows service

SmartDine AI solves all of these automatically.

Transform your operations from reactive to proactive with our intelligent restaurant OS.

Everything You Need

An enterprise-grade feature set designed specifically for modern food businesses.

AI Waiter

Conversational assistant that takes orders and upsells.

QR Ordering

Instant table-side ordering without app downloads.

Kitchen Dashboard

Real-time sync between frontend and kitchen.

Live Order Tracking

Keep customers updated on their food status.

Token Management

Digital token system for seamless pickups.

Revenue Analytics

Actionable insights on sales and performance.

Inventory Tracking

Automated stock reduction with every order.

Customer Insights

Understand your regulars and their preferences.

Menu Management

Dynamic pricing, out-of-stock toggles, and categories.

Notifications

Instant alerts for staff and customers.

Loyalty System

Reward repeat customers automatically.

Multi-Restaurant

Manage all your branches from one account.

Setup in 15 Minutes

No hardware installation. No complex training. Just sign up and start taking orders.

01
STEP 01

Create Account

Sign up and configure your restaurant details in 5 minutes.

02
STEP 02

Upload Menu

Add your categories, items, and high-quality images.

03
STEP 03

Print QR Codes

Generate and print beautiful, branded QR codes for your tables.

04
STEP 04

Go Live

Place QRs on tables. The AI Waiter is immediately ready.

05
STEP 05

Receive Orders

Orders flow directly to your Kitchen Display System.

06
STEP 06

Grow Revenue

Watch your AOV increase through AI upselling and insights.

Frequently Asked Questions

Customers scan a QR code at their table which opens a chat interface on their phone. The AI Waiter converses with them naturally, answers menu questions, recommends dishes based on past preferences or popularity, and takes their order directly into your kitchen system.
SmartDineAI

Turn every restaurant into an AI-powered dining experience. The complete operating system for modern food businesses.
